Class CardImageFactory

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.GUI.Controllers.CardImageFactory
public class CardImageFactory extends Object
Factory utility that creates pre-configured ImageView instances for every visual asset used in the Mesos GUI (cards, buildings, totems, tiles, events). All images are loaded once and stored in a thread-safe cache keyed by resource path.

  • Method Details

    • defaultTileImageView

      public static javafx.scene.image.ImageView defaultTileImageView(int playerCount, double fitHeight)
      Creates an ImageView for the default tile of the given player count.
      Parameters:
      playerCount - the number of players (determines which tile image to use).
      fitHeight - the display height in pixels; aspect ratio is preserved.
      Returns:
      a configured ImageView for the default tile.

    • offerTileImageView

      public static javafx.scene.image.ImageView offerTileImageView(char tileID, double fitHeight)
      Creates an ImageView for the offer tile with the given identifier.
      Parameters:
      tileID - the single-character identifier of the offer tile.
      fitHeight - the display height in pixels; aspect ratio is preserved.
      Returns:
      a configured ImageView for the offer tile.

    • cardImageView

      public static javafx.scene.image.ImageView cardImageView(CardDTO card, double fitHeight)
      Creates an ImageView for a tribe-member or event card described by the given DTO. The correct image is selected from the card type and its role-specific attributes. The DTO is stored in the view's userData for later retrieval.
      Parameters:
      card - the card data-transfer object describing the card to render.
      fitHeight - the display height in pixels; aspect ratio is preserved.
      Returns:
      a configured ImageView for the card.

    • buildingImageView

      public static javafx.scene.image.ImageView buildingImageView(BuildingDTO bld, double fitHeight)
      Creates an ImageView for a building card described by the given DTO. The era is inferred from the building ID range (1–6 era I, 7–13 era II, 14+ era III). The DTO is stored in the view's userData for later retrieval.
      Parameters:
      bld - the building data-transfer object describing the building to render.
      fitHeight - the display height in pixels; aspect ratio is preserved.
      Returns:
      a configured ImageView for the building.

    • totemImage

      public static javafx.scene.image.Image totemImage(COLOR color)
      Returns the cached totem Image for the given color.
      Parameters:
      color - the totem color.
      Returns:
      the Image corresponding to the given color.

    • totemPath

      public static String totemPath(COLOR color)
      Returns the classpath-relative image path for the totem of the given color.
      Parameters:
      color - the totem color.
      Returns:
      the resource path string for the totem image.

    • eventImage

      public static javafx.scene.image.Image eventImage(int eventID, EVENT_TYPE eventType)
      Returns the cached event card Image for the given event ID and type.
      Parameters:
      eventID - the unique identifier of the event.
      eventType - the category of the event (hunt, sustenance, shaman, paintings).
      Returns:
      the Image for the specified event card.

    • preloadEventImages

      public static void preloadEventImages()
      Pre-loads all twelve event card images into the cache. Should be called once at startup to avoid UI stutter during the first event reveal.

    • eventTypePath

      public static String eventTypePath(EVENT_TYPE type)
      Returns the filename segment that identifies the event type in the image path.
      Parameters:
      type - the event type.
      Returns:
      the path segment string for the given event type.
